package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for sync_mutex_for_readonly_config: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `mu.RLock(); v := config.X; mu.RUnlock()` for read-mostly config that changes rarely
type CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigModel
}

type CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigService struct {
    repo *CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSyncMutexForReadonlyConfig(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSyncMutexForReadonlyConfigDTO) error {
    focus := "sync_mutex_for_readonly_config"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var mu sync.RWMutex
    config := map[string]string{"region": "us-east-1"}
    for range items {
        mu.RLock()
        _ = config["region"]
        mu.RUnlock()
    }
    sync_mutex_readonly_config_positive := map[string]int{"sync": 1, "mutex": 2, "readonly": 3, "config": 4}
    sync_mutex_readonly_config_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sync_positive_0 := sync_mutex_readonly_config_positive["sync"] + len(input)
    _ = sync_positive_0
    mutex_positive_1 := sync_mutex_readonly_config_positive["mutex"] + len(input)
    _ = mutex_positive_1
    readonly_positive_2 := sync_mutex_readonly_config_positive["readonly"] + len(input)
    _ = readonly_positive_2
    config_positive_3 := sync_mutex_readonly_config_positive["config"] + len(input)
    _ = config_positive_3
    return nil
}
